note: MCP servers consumed by the OpenAI Responses API as tools=[{type:'mcp', server_url:...}]. Remote servers must be opted-in via /etc/mios/ai/v1/mcp.json overlay.

servers.name: mios-fs
servers.description: Read-only filesystem browser scoped to /var/lib/mios and /usr/share/mios.

servers.name: mios-kb
servers.description: Local knowledge-base retrieval over the OpenAI-API-shaped kb manifest.

servers.name: mios-forge
servers.description: Self-hosted Forgejo instance (mios-forge.container). Forgejo exposes a Gitea-compatible REST API at /api/v1; this entry lets agents browse repos, issues, and pull requests on the local forge.
